create.title: Create New Topic
create.description: Organize your documents by creating focused topics for different areas of knowledge.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to achieve with this topic. What specific knowledge or skills are you building? This helps organize relevant information effectively.
create.example: Example: "Learn modern React patterns and best practices for building scalable web applications"

edit.title: Edit Topic
edit.description: Update the name and description of this topic.
edit.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to achieve with this topic...

manage.title: Manage Topics
manage.description: View, edit, and organize all your topics.
manage.noTopicsDescription: Create your first topic to start organizing your knowledge.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Topic
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{topicName}}"? This action cannot be undone. Files associated with this topic will not be deleted.

selector.title: Select Topics
selector.description: Choose which topics this file belongs to. You can select multiple topics or create new ones.
selector.noTopicsDescription: Create your first topic to start organizing your files.

createMode.title: Create New Topic
createMode.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to achieve with this topic...

filter.selectTopic: Select a topic to filter by
